title: helichrysum auronitens
intro: Helichrysum auronitens, also known as yellow cushion bush, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Helichrysum auronitens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant's essential oil can be extracted through steam distillation and is used in herbal preparations such as topical creams and essential oil blends, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
